# dafrjulia - Data in Axes in Formats for R

The goal of dafrjulia is to provide R bindings for the
[DataAxesFormats.jl](https://github.com/tanaylab/DataAxesFormats.jl)
Julia package, which provides a uniform generic interface for accessing
1D and 2D data arranged along some set of axes. This is a much-needed
generalization of the [AnnData](https://github.com/scverse/anndata)
functionality.

The dafrjulia package enables R users to access `Daf` data using
familiar R interfaces while leveraging the powerful implementation
provided by the Julia package. The package follows a functional
interface similar to the Julia implementation, with some limitations due
to the limitations of JuliaCall (see
[below](#important-note-about-data-copying)).

## Installation

You can install the development version of dafrjulia from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("tanaylab/dafrjulia")
```

Note that dafrjulia requires the Julia programming language and the
DataAxesFormats.jl package to be installed. The package uses
[JuliaCall](https://github.com/JuliaInterop/JuliaCall) to interface with
Julia from R.

## Usage

The R package provides an interface similar to the Julia package, with
functions that mirror the Julia API:

``` r

library(dafrjulia)
# Setup connection to Julia
setup_daf()
```

``` r

# Create a DAF object in memory
daf <- memory_daf("example")

# Add axes
add_axis(daf, "obs", c("cell1", "cell2", "cell3"))
add_axis(daf, "var", c("gene1", "gene2"))

# Add vector data
set_vector(daf, "obs", "score", c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9))

# Add matrix data
mat <- matrix(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6), nrow = 3, ncol = 2)
set_matrix(daf, "obs", "var", "counts", mat)

# Access data
get_vector(daf, "obs", "score")
#> cell1 cell2 cell3 
#>   0.1   0.5   0.9
get_matrix(daf, "obs", "var", "counts")
#>       gene1 gene2
#> cell1     1     4
#> cell2     2     5
#> cell3     3     6

# Get a dataframe view
get_dataframe(daf, "obs", c("score"))
#>       score
#> cell1   0.1
#> cell2   0.5
#> cell3   0.9
```

## Querying Data

One of the powerful features of dafrjulia is its query language. You can
use queries to access and transform data flexibly. The package provides
a convenient `[` operator for concise query syntax:

``` r

# Create a sample dataset
daf <- memory_daf("query_examples")
add_axis(daf, "cell", c("A", "B", "C"))
add_axis(daf, "gene", c("X", "Y", "Z"))
set_vector(daf, "cell", "age", c(1, 5, 10))
set_vector(daf, "cell", "type", c("T", "B", "NK"))
set_scalar(daf, "version", "1.0")
set_matrix(daf, "cell", "gene", "counts", matrix(1:9, nrow = 3, ncol = 3))

# Basic queries using the [ operator
# Get scalar values
daf[". version"] # Get a scalar
#> [1] "1.0"

# Access axes and properties
daf["@ ?"] # List all axes
#> [1] "gene" "cell"
daf["@ cell : ?"] # List properties of the "cell" axis
#> [1] "type" "age"

# Access vector data
daf["@ cell : age"] # Get the "age" vector for all cells
#>  A  B  C 
#>  1  5 10

# Access matrix data
daf["@ cell @ gene :: counts"] # Get the full counts matrix
#>   X Y Z
#> A 1 4 7
#> B 2 5 8
#> C 3 6 9

# Filter data
daf["@ cell [ age > 2 ] : type"] # Get types of cells with age > 2
#>    B    C 
#>  "B" "NK"

# Transform data
daf["@ cell : age % Abs"] # Get absolute values of ages
#>  A  B  C 
#>  1  5 10
daf["@ cell : age % Log base 2"] # Get log2 of ages
#>        A        B        C 
#> 0.000000 2.321928 3.321928

# Aggregations
daf["@ cell : age >> Max"] # Get maximum age
#> [1] 10
daf["@ cell : age >> Mean"] # Get mean age
#> [1] 5.333333

# Complex operations can be built using the pipe operator or query functions
# Get types of cells with age > 2
Axis("cell") |>
    BeginMask("age") |>
    IsGreater(2) |>
    EndMask() |>
    LookupVector("type") |>
    get_query(daf)
#>    B    C 
#>  "B" "NK"
```

The query syntax follows a simple pattern:

- `@ axis` selects an axis
- `. property` retrieves a scalar
- `: property` retrieves a vector property
- `:: property` retrieves a matrix property
- `% operation` applies an element-wise operation
- `>> reduction` applies a reduction operation
- `[ property comparison value ]` filters by a property

See the Julia
[documentation](https://tanaylab.github.io/DataAxesFormats.jl/v0.2.0/queries.html)
for more details about the query language.

### Note on Data Transfer

The dafrjulia package uses [jlview](https://github.com/tanaylab/jlview)
for zero-copy transfer of arrays from Julia to R. However, writing data
from R to Julia (e.g., via `set_vector` or `set_matrix`) still involves
copying through JuliaCall. This means that `get_empty_dense_vector`,
`get_empty_sparse_vector` and their matrix equivalents do not provide
the in-place filling benefit they offer in Julia.

## Key Features

The dafrjulia package inherits the key features of DataAxesFormats.jl:

- Support for both in-memory and persistent data storage
- Thread-safe implementation using read/write locks
- Ability to import and export AnnData objects
- Support for views and adapters
- Chaining repositories for efficient reuse of data
- Flexible data model based on axes, vectors, matrices, and scalar data
- Explicit support for grouped axes
- Simple query language for common operations
- Control over data layout and support for both dense and sparse
  matrices

## Status

This package is in early development. The API is subject to change based
on user feedback. Comments, bug reports, and PRs are welcome!

### Future Plans

In future releases, we plan to implement a dplyr-like API for dafrjulia
to make it even more intuitive for R users. This will allow you to use
familiar verbs like [`filter()`](https://rdrr.io/r/stats/filter.html),
`select()`, `mutate()`, and `summarize()` with dafrjulia objects,
combining the power of the Julia implementation with the ergonomics of
the tidyverse.

# Package index

## Core DAF Functionality

Core functions for working with Daf objects

- [`Daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Daf.md) : Daf
  (Data Axes Format) S3 object
- [`is_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/is_daf.md)
  : Check if object is a Daf
- [`print(`*`<Daf>`*`)`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/print.Daf.md)
  : Print method for Daf objects
- [`description()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/description.md)
  : Get description of a Daf object
- [`` `[`( ``*`<Daf>`*`)`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/sub-.Daf.md)
  : Extract results from a Daf object using a query
- [`setup_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/setup_daf.md)
  : Set up of the Julia environment needed for DataAxesFormats and
  TanayLabUtilities
- [`use_default_julia_environment()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/use_default_julia_environment.md)
  : Use default or custom Julia environment
- [`install_daf_packages()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/install_daf_packages.md)
  : Install Julia packages needed for DataAxesFormats and
  TanayLabUtilities
- [`load_daf_packages()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/load_daf_packages.md)
  : Load Julia packages needed for DataAxesFormats and TanayLabUtilities
- [`daf_name()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/daf_name.md)
  [`name()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/daf_name.md)
  : Gets the name of a Daf object

## AnnData Facade

AnnData-like live facade for Daf objects

- [`DafAnnData`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/DafAnnData.md)
  : AnnData-like live facade for a Daf object
- [`as_anndata()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/as_anndata.md)
  : Create an AnnData-like facade for a Daf object

## Example Data

Functions for loading example data

- [`example_cells_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/example_cells_daf.md)
  : Load example cells data into a Daf object
- [`example_metacells_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/example_metacells_daf.md)
  : Load example metacells data into a Daf object
- [`example_chain_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/example_chain_daf.md)
  : Load example chain data into a Daf object

## Data Access and Query

Functions for querying and retrieving data from Daf objects

- [`get_dataframe()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_dataframe.md)
  [`get_tidy()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_dataframe.md)
  : Get a dataframe from a Daf object
- [`get_dataframe_query()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_dataframe_query.md)
  : Apply a query to a Daf object and return result as a data.frame
- [`get_empty_dense_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_dense_matrix.md)
  : Get an empty dense matrix for filling
- [`get_empty_dense_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_dense_vector.md)
  : Get an empty dense vector for filling
- [`get_empty_sparse_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_sparse_matrix.md)
  : Get an empty sparse matrix for filling
- [`get_empty_sparse_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_sparse_vector.md)
  : Get an empty sparse vector for filling
- [`get_frame()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_frame.md)
  : Get a dataframe from a Daf object (Julia-style)
- [`get_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_matrix.md)
  : Get matrix from a Daf object
- [`get_query()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_query.md)
  : Apply a query to a Daf object
- [`get_scalar()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_scalar.md)
  : Get scalar value from a Daf object
- [`get_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_vector.md)
  : Get vector from a Daf object
- [`has_query()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/has_query.md)
  : Check if a query can be applied to a Daf object
- [`parse_query()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/parse_query.md)
  : Parse a query string into a query object
- [`query_result_dimensions()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/query_result_dimensions.md)
  : Get the number of dimensions of a query result
- [`is_axis_query()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/is_axis_query.md)
  : Check if a query returns axis entries
- [`query_axis_name()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/query_axis_name.md)
  : Get the axis name from a query
- [`query_requires_relayout()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/query_requires_relayout.md)
  : Check if a query requires relayout
- [`escape_value()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/escape_value.md)
  : Escape a value for use in a query string
- [`unescape_value()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/unescape_value.md)
  : Unescape a value from a query string

## Readers and Formats

Reading Daf data from different sources and formats

- [`memory_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/memory_daf.md)
  : Create a Daf object with in-memory storage
- [`h5df()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/h5df.md) :
  Create a Daf object with HDF5-based storage
- [`files_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/files_daf.md)
  : Create a Daf object with file-based storage
- [`h5ad_as_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/h5ad_as_daf.md)
  : Convert h5ad file to a Daf object
- [`read_only()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/read_only.md)
  : Create a read-only wrapper for a Daf object
- [`chain_reader()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/chain_reader.md)
  : Create a read-only chain wrapper of DafReader objects
- [`complete_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/complete_daf.md)
  : Complete chain of Daf repositories
- [`complete_chain()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/complete_chain.md)
  : Create a persistent chain from a base Daf and a new Daf
- [`complete_path()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/complete_path.md)
  : Get the complete filesystem path of a persistent Daf repository
- [`open_daf()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/open_daf.md)
  : Open a Daf repository based on path

## Writers

Writing Daf data to different formats

- [`daf_as_h5ad()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/daf_as_h5ad.md)
  : Convert Daf object to h5ad file
- [`chain_writer()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/chain_writer.md)
  : Create a writable chain wrapper of DafReader objects

## Constants and Handlers

Constants and handler functions

- [`ALL_AXES`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/ALL_AXES.md)
  : All axes specifier
- [`ALL_MATRICES`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/ALL_MATRICES.md)
  : All matrices specifier
- [`ALL_SCALARS`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/ALL_SCALARS.md)
  : All scalars specifier
- [`ALL_VECTORS`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/ALL_VECTORS.md)
  : All vectors specifier
- [`VIEW_ALL_AXES`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/VIEW_ALL_AXES.md)
  : View all axes specifier
- [`VIEW_ALL_DATA`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/VIEW_ALL_DATA.md)
  : View all data specifier
- [`VIEW_ALL_MATRICES`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/VIEW_ALL_MATRICES.md)
  : View all matrices specifier
- [`VIEW_ALL_SCALARS`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/VIEW_ALL_SCALARS.md)
  : View all scalars specifier
- [`VIEW_ALL_VECTORS`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/VIEW_ALL_VECTORS.md)
  : View all vectors specifier
- [`IGNORE_HANDLER`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/abnormal_handlers.md)
  [`WARN_HANDLER`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/abnormal_handlers.md)
  [`ERROR_HANDLER`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/abnormal_handlers.md)
  : Handler types for abnormal operations
- [`inefficient_action_handler()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/inefficient_action_handler.md)
  : Set the handler for inefficient matrix access

## Axes and Properties

Functions for managing axes and properties in Daf objects

- [`has_axis()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/has_axis.md)
  : Check if an axis exists in a Daf object
- [`add_axis()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/add_axis.md)
  : Add axis to a Daf object
- [`delete_axis()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/delete_axis.md)
  : Delete axis from a Daf object
- [`axis_contract()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axis_contract.md)
  : Create an axis contract specification
- [`axis_dict()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axis_dict.md)
  : Get dictionary of axis entries to indices
- [`axis_entries()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axis_entries.md)
  : Get entry names for indices in an axis
- [`axis_indices()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axis_indices.md)
  : Get indices of entries in an axis
- [`axis_length()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axis_length.md)
  : Get length of an axis in a Daf object
- [`axis_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axis_vector.md)
  : Get vector of axis entries from a Daf object
- [`axis_version_counter()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axis_version_counter.md)
  : Get axis version counter
- [`axes_set()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/axes_set.md)
  : Get set of axis names from a Daf object
- [`matrices_set()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/matrices_set.md)
  : Get set of matrix names for axes in a Daf object
- [`scalars_set()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/scalars_set.md)
  : Get set of scalar names from a Daf object
- [`vectors_set()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/vectors_set.md)
  : Get set of vector names for an axis in a Daf object
- [`has_scalar()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/has_scalar.md)
  : Check if a scalar exists in a Daf object
- [`has_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/has_vector.md)
  : Check if a vector exists in a Daf object
- [`has_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/has_matrix.md)
  : Check if a matrix exists in a Daf object
- [`delete_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/delete_matrix.md)
  : Delete matrix from a Daf object
- [`delete_scalar()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/delete_scalar.md)
  : Delete scalar from a Daf object
- [`delete_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/delete_vector.md)
  : Delete vector from a Daf object
- [`get_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_matrix.md)
  : Get matrix from a Daf object
- [`get_scalar()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_scalar.md)
  : Get scalar value from a Daf object
- [`get_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_vector.md)
  : Get vector from a Daf object
- [`set_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/set_matrix.md)
  : Set matrix in a Daf object
- [`set_scalar()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/set_scalar.md)
  : Set scalar value in a Daf object
- [`set_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/set_vector.md)
  : Set vector in a Daf object
- [`relayout_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/relayout_matrix.md)
  : Relayout matrix in a Daf object
- [`matrix_version_counter()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/matrix_version_counter.md)
  : Get matrix version counter
- [`vector_version_counter()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/vector_version_counter.md)
  : Get vector version counter
- [`get_empty_dense_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_dense_vector.md)
  : Get an empty dense vector for filling
- [`get_empty_sparse_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_sparse_vector.md)
  : Get an empty sparse vector for filling
- [`get_empty_dense_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_dense_matrix.md)
  : Get an empty dense matrix for filling
- [`get_empty_sparse_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/get_empty_sparse_matrix.md)
  : Get an empty sparse matrix for filling
- [`filled_empty_sparse_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/filled_empty_sparse_vector.md)
  : Signal that an empty sparse vector has been filled
- [`filled_empty_sparse_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/filled_empty_sparse_matrix.md)
  : Signal that an empty sparse matrix has been filled

## Query Operations - Element-wise

Element-wise operations that preserve data shape but transform values

- [`Abs()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Abs.md) : Abs
  query operation
- [`Clamp()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Clamp.md) :
  Clamp query operation
- [`Convert()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Convert.md)
  : Convert query operation
- [`Fraction()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Fraction.md)
  : Fraction query operation
- [`Log()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Log.md) : Log
  query operation
- [`Round()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Round.md) :
  Round query operation
- [`Significant()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Significant.md)
  : Significant query operation

## Query Operations - Reduction

Reduction operations that reduce dimensions (matrix to vector, vector to
scalar)

- [`Sum()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Sum.md) : Sum
  query operation
- [`Mean()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Mean.md) :
  Mean query operation
- [`Median()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Median.md)
  : Median query operation
- [`Min()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Min.md) : Min
  query operation
- [`Max()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Max.md) : Max
  query operation
- [`Var()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Var.md) : Var
  query operation
- [`VarN()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/VarN.md) :
  VarN query operation
- [`Std()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Std.md) : Std
  query operation
- [`StdN()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/StdN.md) :
  StdN query operation
- [`Quantile()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Quantile.md)
  : Quantile query operation
- [`Count()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Count.md) :
  Count query operation
- [`GeoMean()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/GeoMean.md)
  : GeoMean query operation
- [`Mode()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Mode.md) :
  Mode query operation
- [`CountBy()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/CountBy.md)
  : CountBy query operation
- [`GroupBy()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/GroupBy.md)
  : GroupBy query operation
- [`GroupColumnsBy()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/GroupColumnsBy.md)
  : GroupColumnsBy query operation
- [`GroupRowsBy()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/GroupRowsBy.md)
  : GroupRowsBy query operation
- [`ReduceToColumn()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/ReduceToColumn.md)
  : ReduceToColumn query operation
- [`ReduceToRow()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/ReduceToRow.md)
  : ReduceToRow query operation

## Query Operations - Logical

Logical operations for filtering and combining data

- [`And()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndMask.md)
  [`AndMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndMask.md)
  : AndMask query operation
- [`AndNot()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndNegatedMask.md)
  [`AndNegatedMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndNegatedMask.md)
  : AndNegatedMask query operation
- [`Or()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrMask.md)
  [`OrMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrMask.md)
  : OrMask query operation
- [`OrNot()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrNegatedMask.md)
  [`OrNegatedMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrNegatedMask.md)
  : OrNegatedMask query operation
- [`Xor()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorMask.md)
  [`XorMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorMask.md)
  : XorMask query operation
- [`XorNot()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorNegatedMask.md)
  [`XorNegatedMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorNegatedMask.md)
  : XorNegatedMask query operation
- [`IsEqual()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsEqual.md)
  : IsEqual query operation
- [`IsGreater()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsGreater.md)
  : IsGreater query operation
- [`IsGreaterEqual()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsGreaterEqual.md)
  : IsGreaterEqual query operation
- [`IsLess()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsLess.md)
  : IsLess query operation
- [`IsLessEqual()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsLessEqual.md)
  : IsLessEqual query operation
- [`IsMatch()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsMatch.md)
  : IsMatch query operation
- [`IsNotEqual()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsNotEqual.md)
  : IsNotEqual query operation
- [`IsNotMatch()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IsNotMatch.md)
  : IsNotMatch query operation

## Query Operations - Selection

Operations for selecting data from axes and properties

- [`Axis()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Axis.md) :
  Axis query operation
- [`Lookup()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/LookupVector.md)
  [`LookupVector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/LookupVector.md)
  : LookupVector query operation
- [`LookupScalar()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/LookupScalar.md)
  : LookupScalar query operation
- [`LookupMatrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/LookupMatrix.md)
  : LookupMatrix query operation
- [`Names()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Names.md) :
  Names query operation
- [`AsAxis()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AsAxis.md)
  : AsAxis query operation
- [`IfMissing()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IfMissing.md)
  : IfMissing query operation
- [`IfNot()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/IfNot.md) :
  IfNot query operation
- [`BeginMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/BeginMask.md)
  : BeginMask query operation
- [`BeginNegatedMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/BeginNegatedMask.md)
  : BeginNegatedMask query operation
- [`EndMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/EndMask.md)
  : EndMask query operation
- [`SquareMaskColumn()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareColumnIs.md)
  [`SquareColumnIs()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareColumnIs.md)
  : SquareColumnIs query operation
- [`SquareMaskRow()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareRowIs.md)
  [`SquareRowIs()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareRowIs.md)
  : SquareRowIs query operation

## Views and Adapters

Creating views and adapters for Daf objects

- [`adapter()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/adapter.md)
  : Invoke a computation on a view of some data set and return the
  result
- [`viewer()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/viewer.md)
  : Create a read-only view of a Daf data set
- [`reconstruct_axis()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/reconstruct_axis.md)
  : Reconstruct implicit axes

## Contracts

Contract-based validation for Daf objects

- [`RequiredInput`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/RequiredInput.md)
  [`OptionalInput`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/RequiredInput.md)
  [`CreatedOutput`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/RequiredInput.md)
  [`GuaranteedOutput`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/RequiredInput.md)
  [`OptionalOutput`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/RequiredInput.md)
  : Contract Expectation Types
- [`create_contract()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/create_contract.md)
  : Create a Contract specification
- [`contractor()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/contractor.md)
  : Create a contract-aware wrapper for a Daf
- [`contract_docs()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/contract_docs.md)
  : Convert contract to documentation string
- [`verify_contract()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/verify_contract.md)
  : Verify a DAF object against a contract
- [`verify_input()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/verify_input.md)
  : Verify DAF input against contract
- [`verify_output()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/verify_output.md)
  : Verify DAF output against contract
- [`print(`*`<DafContract>`*`)`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/print.DafContract.md)
  : Print method for DafContract
- [`scalar_contract()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/scalar_contract.md)
  : Create a scalar contract specification
- [`vector_contract()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/vector_contract.md)
  : Create a vector contract specification
- [`matrix_contract()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/matrix_contract.md)
  : Create a matrix contract specification
- [`tensor_contract()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/tensor_contract.md)
  : Create a tensor contract specification

## Groups

Functions for working with groups of axis entries

- [`group_names()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/group_names.md)
  : Generate names for groups of axis entries
- [`compact_groups()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/compact_groups.md)
  : Compact group indices
- [`collect_group_members()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/collect_group_members.md)
  : Collect group members from group indices

## Data Operations

Operations for transforming and combining Daf objects

- [`concatenate()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/concatenate.md)
  : Concatenate multiple Daf data sets along some axis
- [`copy_all()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/copy_all.md)
  : Copy all content from source to destination
- [`copy_axis()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/copy_axis.md)
  : Copy an axis from source to destination
- [`copy_matrix()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/copy_matrix.md)
  : Copy a matrix from source to destination
- [`copy_scalar()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/copy_scalar.md)
  : Copy a scalar from source to destination
- [`copy_tensor()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/copy_tensor.md)
  : Copy a tensor from source to destination
- [`copy_vector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/copy_vector.md)
  : Copy a vector from source to destination

## Utilities

Utility functions for working with Daf objects

- [`empty_cache()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/empty_cache.md)
  : Empty cache of a Daf object
- [`set_seed()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/set_seed.md)
  : Set a seed both in Julia and R
- [`setup_logger()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/setup_logger.md)
  : Set up a global logger

## Deprecated

Deprecated functions and their replacements

- [`deprecated-queries`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/deprecated-queries.md)
  : Deprecated query operations
- [`And()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndMask.md)
  [`AndMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndMask.md)
  : AndMask query operation
- [`AndNot()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndNegatedMask.md)
  [`AndNegatedMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/AndNegatedMask.md)
  : AndNegatedMask query operation
- [`Or()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrMask.md)
  [`OrMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrMask.md)
  : OrMask query operation
- [`OrNot()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrNegatedMask.md)
  [`OrNegatedMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/OrNegatedMask.md)
  : OrNegatedMask query operation
- [`Xor()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorMask.md)
  [`XorMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorMask.md)
  : XorMask query operation
- [`XorNot()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorNegatedMask.md)
  [`XorNegatedMask()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/XorNegatedMask.md)
  : XorNegatedMask query operation
- [`Lookup()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/LookupVector.md)
  [`LookupVector()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/LookupVector.md)
  : LookupVector query operation
- [`Fetch()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/Fetch.md) :
  Fetch (Deprecated)
- [`MaskSlice()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/MaskSlice.md)
  : MaskSlice (Deprecated)
- [`SquareMaskColumn()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareColumnIs.md)
  [`SquareColumnIs()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareColumnIs.md)
  : SquareColumnIs query operation
- [`SquareMaskRow()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareRowIs.md)
  [`SquareRowIs()`](https://tanaylab.github.io/dafrjulia/reference/SquareRowIs.md)
  : SquareRowIs query operation
